design.core: each importer is a pub(crate) fn over a literal string (JSON/text/history); tauri wrappers only adapt io/errors so tests never touch HOME or network
design.postman: collection v2.1; folders->nested Collection(parent_id); item->StoredRequest; raw/host+path url; headers; raw/urlencoded/formdata->multipart body; bearer/basic/apikey auth; {{var}} preserved; pm.* scripts NOT translated, one warning per request; environment+globals->Environment
design.insomnia: export v4; request_group->Collection; request->StoredRequest; environment->Environment; {{ _.var }}->{{env.var}} (utf8-safe rewrite); complex {% ... %} tags left verbatim with one warning
design.har: log.entries[].request->StoredRequest grouped by host; denoise skips image/css/font/js mime (warning with count); Authorization/Cookie -> secret warning per host
design.http_file: JetBrains/.http dialect; ### block split; METHOD URL line; headers to blank line then body; # // comments; VS Code @name; {{v}} preserved
design.shell_history: ~/.zsh_history (strip ': <ts>:<dur>;' prefix) + ~/.bash_history; filter curl lines (also after VAR=val / sudo); dedup; newest first; limit

verification.tests: 103 unit + 14 integration passed, 2 ignored (keychain); 11 new importer tests all offline
